title: selaginella smithiorum
intro: Selaginella smithiorum, also known as 'Spikemoss', is a type of evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella smithiorum include its antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage, infections, and chronic diseases. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including capsules and powders.
